title: Alberta nurses contract talks stalled as UCP suspends arbitration
notes: UCP halts nurses' wage arbitration citing province's financial review. Arbitrator was to hear UNA arguments on wage settlement for Year 3 of contract; postponed day-of at government's request. Finance Minister Toews: 'We're simply understanding the realities.' AFL president: 'first step toward using state power to cut wages.' UNA filed LRB request for new hearing date. Anchors EVT-051.
